hero.title: Turn Conversations Into Revenue
hero.subtitle: Your AI assistant that handles chats, matches tones, drives sales, and never sleeps. Scale your Telegram business without scaling your workload.

problems.title: Overwhelmed by Messages
problems.description: Hundreds of chats flood in daily. You can't respond fast enough, and potential sales slip away.

problems.title: Inconsistent Responses
problems.description: Tired replies, missed opportunities, forgotten follow-ups. Your revenue suffers from human limitations.

problems.title: No Time for Growth
problems.description: You're stuck in the chat grind. No time to create content, strategize, or scale your business.

solution.title: Meet Your AI Sales Partner
solution.subtitle: Automate conversations. Drive conversions. Scale revenue.
solution.description: Our AI doesn't just respond—it sells. It matches your unique tone, remembers every customer, and strategically guides conversations toward purchases.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to automate and scale

aiConversations.title: AI Conversations
aiConversations.description: Natural, engaging conversations that feel human. Your AI learns your style and responds exactly how you would.
aiConversations.tooltip: Advanced language models trained on your communication style to maintain authentic conversations

smartSales.title: Smart Sales Automation
smartSales.description: Strategically guide conversations toward purchases without being pushy. Know when to offer, when to discount.
smartSales.tooltip: AI analyzes conversation context and timing to optimize sales moments

toneMatching.title: Tone Matching
toneMatching.description: Flirty? Professional? Casual? The AI adapts to your brand voice and matches the customer's energy.
toneMatching.tooltip: Dynamic personality engine that adjusts based on customer behavior and your preferences

crmTracking.title: CRM Tracking
crmTracking.description: Every customer interaction logged. Know who's interested, who's bought, and who needs follow-up.
crmTracking.tooltip: Complete customer profiles with purchase history, preferences, and engagement metrics

followUps.title: Automated Follow-ups
followUps.description: Never lose a lead. Smart reminders and re-engagement messages sent at the perfect time.
followUps.tooltip: AI-powered timing engine that determines optimal follow-up moments

steps.title: Connect Your Telegram
steps.description: Link your Telegram account securely. We use official Telegram API for safe integration.

steps.title: Train Your AI
steps.description: Set your personality, tone, and sales style. The AI learns how you want to communicate.

steps.title: Watch Revenue Grow
steps.description: Your AI handles chats 24/7 while you focus on content, strategy, or just relax.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale as you grow
pricing.footer: All plans include a 7-day free trial. No credit card required.

items.question: How does the AI learn my communication style?
items.answer: During setup, you provide examples of your typical responses and set your personality preferences. The AI uses these to match your unique voice and tone.

items.question: Is my Telegram account secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use Telegram's official API and never store your password. You can revoke access at any time from your Telegram settings.

items.question: Can I review messages before they're sent?
items.answer: Yes! You can set the AI to require approval for certain message types, or let it operate autonomously. You're always in control.

items.question: What happens if the AI encounters something it can't handle?
items.answer: The AI is trained to recognize complex situations and will flag them for your attention. You can step in anytime via the dashboard.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes, no contracts or commitments. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings.

finalCta.title: Ready to Automate Your Sales?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of creators who've transformed their Telegram business with AI.
finalCta.note: No credit card required • 7-day free trial

aiConfig.title: Describe your business
aiConfig.subtitle: Tell us about your business and the AI will create a personalized configuration
aiConfig.placeholder: e.g., I sell exclusive adult content on Telegram. My target audience is men aged 25-45. I want a flirty but professional tone that encourages subscriptions...
aiConfig.tweakPlaceholder: e.g., Make it more aggressive, Add more emojis...

errors.minLength: Please provide a longer description (at least 10 characters)
errors.invalidApiKey: Invalid API key. Please check your API key in Settings.

aiConfig.noProducts: No products generated. Add your products manually.
aiConfig.confirmProductsDesc: Review and edit the products above before saving. Add any missing products.
aiConfig.productsDisclaimer: AI suggested products based on your description. Edit or add as needed.
aiConfig.tweakPlaceholder: e.g., Change tone to more formal, Add product 'VIP Pack $100', Remove subscription products...
aiConfig.tweakHint: Describe the specific changes you want: tone, products, prices, etc.
aiConfig.priceNote: If you don't know the exact price, use 'Inquire' or 'Negotiable'
aiConfig.restrictionsPlaceholder: e.g., Never mention prices directly, Don't share personal info, Avoid medical topics...
aiConfig.restrictionsHint: Add topics or behaviors the AI should avoid
aiConfig.restrictionsEmpty: No restrictions defined. Add restrictions to control AI behavior.
